about.title: About
about.greeting: Hey, I'm Fandi. Great to meet you!
about.intro: I'm a Jakarta-based UI/UX Designer & UI/UX Engineer with 3+ years of experience, specializing in dashboards and web applications. I work at the intersection of design, technology, and AI—creating clean, scalable experiences that support both user needs and business goals.
about.intro2: With a hybrid design–technical background, I approach projects beyond visuals—considering usability, feasibility, and system structure from the start. I actively integrate AI tools like ChatGPT into my workflow to accelerate research and ideation while maintaining thoughtful, human-centered decisions.
about.value1Desc: As designers, it is important to possess the ability to empathize with others and work with a variety of people. Open communication with teammates is key in aligning towards a shared vision and goal.
about.value2Desc: Designers often face a range of challenges and must provide effective solutions. Continuing to learn and develop specialized skills is crucial in this field. By honing my ability to solve complex problems, I can help others who may be facing similar challenges by sharing my experiences and expertise.
about.value3Desc: I believe in the principle of "value-first" design, as the primary purpose of a designer is to bring value to products, businesses, and users through design. Prioritizing the creation of value guides me in making the right design decisions.
about.softwareDesc: I mainly use Figma for designing anything and exploring new ideas, Cursor for AI-assisted coding and rapid prototyping, ChatGPT for research and ideation, and Lovable for building high-quality web applications quickly. I also use many other tools to make my design process & communication more efficient.
about.designProcessNote: In my previous work, I closely collaborated with Product Managers to identify core problems and goals, then worked with cross-functional team members, including Engineers and other Designers, to develop optimal solutions.

workSolusi247.title: UI/UX Designer (Contract)
workSolusi247.description: Designing and maintaining scalable user interfaces for dashboards and web applications across internal systems and client-facing platforms. Collaborating closely with product and development teams to ensure usability, consistency, and technical feasibility. Contributing to structured design systems and improving workflow efficiency through user-centered design practices.

workUpwork.title: Freelance UI/UX Designer
workUpwork.description: Delivering high-quality dashboard and web application designs for international clients across SaaS, healthcare, e-commerce, and internal tools.
workUpwork.specialization: Specializing in AI-assisted workflows to accelerate research, ideation, and rapid prototyping while maintaining clarity and usability in complex systems.

workFiverr.title: Freelance UI/UX Designer
workFiverr.description: Designed and delivered user-centered interfaces for startups and small businesses.
workFiverr.focus: Focused on dashboard UI, web app design, and marketing websites with structured UX thinking and pixel-precise visual execution.

workPrimeSkills.title: UI/UX Design Intern
workPrimeSkills.description: Supported the design team in creating immersive user experiences for VR and AR-based applications. Contributed to interface layouts, interaction flows, and usability improvements for experimental digital products. Gained hands-on experience in transforming conceptual ideas into interactive prototypes.
